title: Block Entity Rendering as Block
body:
Block Entity Rendering as Block (or BERB for short) is a ressource pack that gives block models to block entity to allow them to be rendered up to render distance.

Due to the limitation of vanilla ressource pack, both the block model and the entity models are rendered therefore i haven't included certain block entity because they will interfere with their animation with the exception of decorated pot (with a smaller model), ender dragon head and piglin head (where the animated part isn't rendered far away).

This ressource pack is inspired by [BEER](https://modrinth.com/mod/beer).
